sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90033" key="prosrhto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσρητός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">προσερῶ</etym>) <sense id="n90033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accosted, belonging to salutations</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.137</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
